title: Guards Humans (Guard Villagers)
description: A texture pack that replaces the Guards Villagers with humans. 7 variations in total.
body:
![Guards Humans](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e41660957273837b7bd044f5e5260cb05dfa07a8.png)
# *TO USE IT IS **NECESSARY** TO HAVE THE MOD [Guard Villagers](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers)* 

### A texture pack that replaces the Villagers guards with humans. 7 variations in total.
**This depends on the biome**

Personal recommendation:
[Humans Era](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/human-era-villagers-illagers) , [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) 

_**In the mod options, turn on "Use Model Steve"**_

_(the skins used are not mine, the credits are in "credits.txt" in the texture pack)_
_(plis ,read)_
